mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_page_visit_log (id, page_type, page_key, ip, visited_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{pageType}, #{pageKey}, #{ip}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ip) FROM t_page_visit_log WHERE visited_at >= #{startDay}
SELECT country, COUNT(DISTINCT ip) AS cnt FROM t_page_visit_log WHERE visited_at >= #{startDay} AND country IS NOT NULL AND country != '' AND country != 'Local' GROUP BY country ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT * FROM t_page_visit_log WHERE country IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
